summary: Iteration 44 testing completed for Notification Badges feature. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Admin sees all badges (Bons, Achats, Besoins, Fournisseurs, Stats, Notes), Manager sees subset with different colors (Achats=amber vs purple), profile bell with total count, badges hidden when count=0, animate-ping pulsing animation working, 10-second polling updates badges correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test need created and cleaned up during polling test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 tested new Notification Badges feature. Key test IDs: profile-notif-bell (header bell with total), badge-bons (orange), badge-bons-requests (red, combined cancel+mod), badge-achats (purple for admin, amber for manager), badge-needs (red, admin only), badge-po (sky), badge-stats (red, admin only), badge-tips (amber, admin only), badge-notes (red). Backend endpoint: GET /api/notifications/counts?role=admin|manager|server returns {role, counts:{...}, total}. Polling interval: 10 seconds. Badges use animate-ping CSS class for pulsing effect. Badges hidden when count=0. Values >99 show as '99+'.

tests: GET /api/notifications/counts?role=admin returns all 9 keys (needs, purchase_orders, expenses, cancellation_requests, modification_requests, invoices, financial_points, tips_today, notes)
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=manager returns 4 keys (expenses, purchase_orders, invoices, notes)
GET /api/notifications/counts?role=server returns 1 key (notes)
Admin expenses counts pending AND revision_requested statuses
Manager expenses counts ONLY revision_requested status
Manager purchase_orders counts ONLY status='sent'
financial_points counts signed=true AND admin_validated=false
tips_today counts only tips with date=today
Total is sum of all counts
Default role is admin when not specified
Unknown role falls back to server counts
User param accepted without error
Counts increment when items created
Counts decrement when items deleted
Profile notification bell (data-testid='profile-notif-bell') visible with total count
Bell hidden when total=0
Badge Bons (orange) testid=badge-bons shows invoices count
Badge Bons requests (red) testid=badge-bons-requests shows combined cancel+mod count
Badge Achats (purple) testid=badge-achats shows expenses count
Badge Besoins (red) testid=badge-needs shows needs count
Badge Fournisseurs (sky) testid=badge-po shows purchase_orders count
Badge Stats (red) testid=badge-stats shows financial_points count
Badge Notes (red) testid=badge-notes shows notes count
Badge Pourboires (amber) testid=badge-tips shows tips_today count
Badges have animate-ping CSS class for pulsing effect
Badges hidden when count=0
Profile notification bell visible with total count
Badge Achats color=amber (different from admin's purple)
Badge Fournisseurs shows 'sent' POs count
Manager does NOT see Besoins badge
Manager does NOT see Stats badge
Manager does NOT see Pourboires badge
Polling interval is 10 seconds
Badge updates automatically after API creates new item
No manual refresh needed
Badge value >99 renders as '99+' (verified in code)
